title: SOCAR TÃ¼rkiye Starts Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) Trading
content: SOCAR TÃ¼rkiye, TÃ¼rkiye's largest foreign direct investor and integrated industry group, is launching Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) trading in order to accelerate the sustainability-oriented transformation in the energy sector and contribute to the reduction of aviation-related carbon emissions. In line with its approach that places low-carbon solutions at the center of its business model, the company will open its first commercial operation in the field of SAF on January 29, 2026. In line with its approach to supporting the development of the Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) ecosystem, SOCAR TÃ¼rkiye aims to contribute to the transformation steps towards emission reduction in aviation by strengthening its collaborations with industry stakeholders. In this context, a "Memorandum of Understanding" covering cooperation in the field of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) was signed between SOCAR TÃ¼rkiye and Turkish Airlines on August 13, 2025; the two institutions agreed on sustainability-oriented strategic steps in the energy and aviation sectors. The first commercial operation to be implemented is an important stage of this cooperation.
author: Analysts Account
